overview: PrintTrack is a professional mobile-first business dashboard for printing shop management. Track orders, manage quotations, view revenue reports, and access onboarding guides — all from a clean, card-based interface with dark and light mode support.
features: Bottom navigation with Orders, Quotations, Reports, and Tutorial tabs
Orders dashboard with stats cards, searchable order list, and floating action button
Add/edit/delete orders with status badges (Pending, Ready, Delivered)
Quotations form with real-time auto price calculator and convert-to-order
Reports page showing daily/monthly revenue, completed orders, and pending payments
Tutorial page with onboarding guide, tips, and support section
Mobile-first responsive design with smooth transitions
